title: Bluxy-Crystal
description: Crystal PvP pack with a modern, smooth, sleek style for immersive gameplay.
body:
# BluxyCrystal


- Custom GUI & Hotbar
- Custom Obsidian & Crystal Textures
- Custom Font
- Custom Netherite Armor Textures
- Short Swords
- Small Items [Totem, Gap & More]
- Low Fire
- Less sound for Explosions & Fire Ticks
- No Explosion Particles
- No Smoke Particles
- Less Totem Pop Particles
- Smaller Totem Pop Animation


Join my Discord server to get updates and suggest ideas for new projects!

> [https://discord.gg/F49ZPs6RjE](https://discord.gg/F49ZPs6RjE)
